scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && cd backend && npx prisma generate && cd .. && npm run build --workspace=backend && cd mobile && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir ../backend/dist/public && cd .. && node scripts/patch-html.js
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate && cd .. && npm run start --workspace=backend
